title: After the Satsuki Sho: Next Time for Sure!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon wins, shattering
Matikanetannhauser's dream of becoming Triple
Crown champion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Optimistic as always, Matikanetannhauser wants
to use what she learned from today's race to do
better in the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower, who also lost today, is motivated for
the future as well, acknowledging that she still
has a long way to go.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our classic year is far from over, and we're going
to keep running toward the Japanese Derby!
